MTN FOR AN ORDER APPROVING THE DIBURSEMENT OF FUNDS HELD IN TRUST FILED BY PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC. DBA GREAT WESTERN COLLECTION BUREAU HEARING SET FOR APR-12-2012 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 302

DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INCORPORATED'S MOTION FOR AN ORDER APPROVING THE DIBURSEMENT OF FUNDS HELD IN TRUST. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NEITHER THE FORBEARANCE AGREEMENT NOR THE JUNE 27, 2011 ORDER BY THE HONORABLE LORETTA GIORGI IN SAN FRANCISCO SUPERIOR COURT CASE NUMBER CGC 11-511390, "CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC. VS. RICHARD B. COLE" PERMIT THE RELIEF SOUGHT IN THIS MOTION. IT DOES NOT APPEAR, NOR DOES PLAINTIFF SUBMIT PROOF OF, COMPLIANCE WITH THE JUNE 27, 2011 ORDER IN CASE CGC 11-511390 THAT PLAINTIFF "FILE PLEADINGS" WITHIN 45 DAYS TO REMOVE AND REPLACE MR. COLE AS RECEIVER "IN ANY CASES" THAT IT WAS AWARE OF IN WHICH MR. COLE WAS A RECEIVER. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ROLANDO PASQUALI; NOT REPORTED

calendar.matters:
Mtn For An Order Approving The Dibursement Of Funds Held In Trust
Off Calendar Apr-12-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INCORPORATED'S MOTION FOR AN ORDER APPROVING THE DIBURSEMENT OF FUNDS HELD IN TRUST.
Appearances: Peter Glikshtern (260.1991) third party appearing in propria persona; Douglas B. Provencher of Provencher & Flatt LLP (707.284.2380) appearing via Court Call for plaintiff and moving party.
The parties stipulated to have the matter decided by a Judge Pro Tem. Argued and the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: denied without prejudice. Neither the Forbearance Agreement nor the June 27, 2011 order by The Honorable Loretta Giorgi in San Francisco Superior Court Case Number CGC 11-511390, "CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC. vs. RICHARD B. COLE" permit the relief sought in this motion. It does not appear, nor does Plaintiff submit proof of, compliance with the June 27, 2011 order in case CGC 11-511390 that Plaintiff "file pleadings" within 45 days to remove and replace Mr. Cole as receiver "in any cases" that it was aware of in which Mr. Cole was a receiver. Order signed. (302/JPT) Judge Pro Tem: Rolando Pasquali; Not reported

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Mar-25-10 Order Appointing Receiver
Off Calendar Nov-23-2010 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS:
THIRD PARTY METROPOL ENTERTAINMENT CORPORATION'S Motion To Vacate March 25, 2010 Order Appointing Receiver is Off calendar, at the request of the moving party. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Not reported. = (301/PJB)

Notice And Motion For Appointment Of A Receiver And Appoint Richard B. Cole As Receiver
Off Calendar Mar-16-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF CREDITORS TRADE ASSOCIATION, INC.'s Motion For Appointment Of A Receiver And To Appoint Richard B. Cole As Receiver is granted. No opposition has been filed. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.
